'''Skree-skaters''' were [[Sentience/Legends|nonsentient]] creatures native to [[Galantos]] that glided across the gelatinous pools of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], hunting small prey.<ref name="TEGtPaM" />

{{Creature-stub}}
